title: Implement Agent Misrepresentation split-score architecture in SelectQuote HCS Medium-Risk
description: Implement the Agent Misrepresentation score split for the  scorecard, including six decision-element scores, one composite score, and verification that the legacy score remains unchanged.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Execution began under task `plx-51b273`. The implementation will create new Agent Misrepresentation decision-element scores plus a composite score in Plexus and verify the split behavior with predictions.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Verification surfaced category-boundary drift: service-only no-cost language and normal primary-pharmacy transition language were leaking into False Service Claim / Ambiguous Cost Language. Narrowing those prompts so compliant calls can remain all-Yes while true category failures still register.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Requested split-score implementation is now in Plexus. The implementation task is complete and closed. The epic remains open because two follow-ups were filed: `plx-2cd2cf` for real external IDs and `plx-b2349b` for composite/no-cache resolution when scores have no championVersionId.
